_comment: VO-style captions keyed by scenario + step number (1-based). Overrides the auto-generated step description in timing-data for the Remotion render.

landing.1: BakerySense — AI production copilot for retail chains.
landing.2: Sign in with your tenant slug + credentials.
landing.6: Dashboard loads — today's bake plan is ready.

dashboard.1: Three SKUs, three quantities. Each row: q0.5, q0.7, confidence band, newsvendor bake.
dashboard.2: Switch branches — same model, different sales patterns.

sku-detail.1: Quantile band shows the full demand distribution; drivers explain the forecast.

chat.1: Gemma 4 chat — ask in plain language.
chat.2: "How many TRADITIONAL BAGUETTE should I bake tomorrow?"
chat.3: Gemma 4 calls the forecaster and explain_drivers — answer grounded in real numbers.

display-case.1: Take one photo of the shelf — Gemma vision counts units, suggests markdowns.

retraining.1: Close out the day. Weekly retrain on your actuals — hot-swapped via KV pointer.

signout.2: Refresh-token tombstones + JWKS rotation on the next line.
